## 📌 About

**CodeSunGrab** is a powerful command-line media downloader built with Python, wrapped in Node.js for npm distribution. It supports multiple platforms and provides a beautiful terminal experience with authentication, email verification, and real-time progress tracking.

Built under the **CodeSun** brand by **Mahedi Hasan Rafsun**.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎯 Core Features
- ✅ **Multi-Platform Download** - YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Reddit & more
- ✅ **Video Download** - Best quality MP4 with format selection
- ✅ **Audio Only** - Extract audio as MP3 (192K quality)
- ✅ **Video + Subtitles** - Auto-download & embed subtitles (EN, BN, HI)
- ✅ **Playlist Download** - Full playlist or custom range
- ✅ **Batch Download** - Multiple URLs at once (Sequential/Parallel)
- ✅ **TikTok Special** - With/Without watermark toggle
- ✅ **Resume Support** - Continue interrupted downloads

### 🔐 Authentication System
- ✅ **Appwrite Auth** - Secure user registration & login
- ✅ **Email Verification** - 6-digit code verification
- ✅ **Session Management** - Auto-login with timeout
- ✅ **Beautiful HTML Emails** - Professional verification emails with logo

### 🎨 Terminal UI
- ✅ **ASCII Art Banner** - CodeSunGrab branding
- ✅ **Typing Animations** - Smooth text display
- ✅ **Loading Bars** - npm-style spinner + progress
- ✅ **Colored Output** - Argentina flag theme (Sky Blue + White + Gold)
- ✅ **User Profile** - Bullet-style info display
- ✅ **Download Dashboard** - Real-time progress tracking

### ⚙️ Advanced Settings
- ✅ **Proxy Support** - HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy
- ✅ **Speed Limit** - Control download speed
- ✅ **Max Workers** - Parallel download limit
- ✅ **Custom Path** - Choose download location
- ✅ **Download History** - Track all downloads
- ✅ **History Clear** - Wipe history when needed

---

## 📦 Install

### npm (Recommended)
```bash
npm install -g codesungrab
```

Manual Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/CodeWithRafsun/CodeSungrab.git
cd CodeSungrab
pip install -r src/requirements.txt
node cli.js
```

Termux (Android)

```bash
pkg install python nodejs ffmpeg
npm install -g codesungrab
codesungrab
```

---

🚀 Usage

```bash
# Start the app
codesungrab

# or use short command
sungrab
```

First Time Setup

1. Run codesungrab
2. Copy src/.env.example to src/.env
3. Fill in your Appwrite & SMTP credentials
4. Create account or login

---

⌨️ Commands

Main Menu

```
[1] Single Download
[2] Batch Download (Multiple URLs)
[3] Playlist Download (YouTube)
[4] Advanced Settings
[5] View History
[6] Clear History
[7] About
[8] Account Settings
[9] Logout
[0] Exit
```

Download Types

```
[1] Video - Best quality MP4
[2] Audio Only - MP3 format (192K)
[3] Video + Subtitles - With captions
```

Batch Modes

```
[1] Sequential - One by one
[2] Parallel - Up to MAX_WORKERS at once
```

Advanced Settings

```
[1] Set Proxy
[2] Set Speed Limit
[3] Set Max Workers
[4] View History
[5] Clear History
```

---

🔧 Configuration

Environment Variables (src/.env)

```env
# Appwrite Configuration
APPWRITE_ENDPOINT=https://cloud.appwrite.io/v1
APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID=your_project_id
APPWRITE_API_KEY=your_api_key
APPWRITE_DATABASE_ID=your_database_id

# SMTP Email (Gmail)
SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_EMAIL=your_email@gmail.com
SMTP_PASSWORD=your_app_password
SMTP_FROM_NAME=CodeSunGrab Team
```

Appwrite Setup

1. Create account at cloud.appwrite.io
2. Create project → Get Project ID
3. Create API Key → Get API Key
4. Create Database database-sungrab
5. Create Collections: users, downloads

Gmail App Password

1. Enable 2-Step Verification
2. Generate App Password
3. Use in SMTP_PASSWORD

📋 Requirements

Software Minimum Version Required For
Python 3.8+ Core engine
Node.js 14.0+ npm wrapper
pip Latest Python deps
ffmpeg Any Media processing
yt-dlp Latest Download engine

---

❓ FAQ

Q: Why npm if it's Python?
A: npm makes it easy to install globally. The Node.js wrapper calls Python internally.

Q: Does it work on Windows?
A: Yes! Install Python + Node.js, then npm install -g codesungrab.

Q: Is it free?
A: Yes, free to use. Source code is proprietary.

Q: How to update?
A: npm update -g codesungrab

Q: Where are downloads saved?
A: ~/downloads/SunGrab/ (customizable in settings)

Q: How to report bugs?
A: GitHub Issues or email codewithrafsun@gmail.com
